overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a camouflage jacket walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character navigates commercial sidewalks lined with palm trees, crosses wide intersections with yellow crosswalk markings, and passes digital billboards and futuristic glass architecture while light traffic moves through the streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial sidewalk with Eden Plaza neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the Eden Plaza building and palm trees

notable_agents.action: family group standing near the black van on the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic commercial building with large glowing Eden Plaza signage and teal neon accents
tall palm tree with illuminated trunk in planter bed
orange metal safety railing separating sidewalk from street
large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements in pink and cyan neon
futuristic black van parked along the curb with glowing blue underlights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit commercial sidewalk next to the Eden Plaza building. Palm trees and orange safety railings line the path while a black van sits parked on the right. The scene is dominated by bright pink and cyan neon signage reflecting off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide intersection crosswalk with yellow safety stripes

events.description: character steps off sidewalk onto wide crosswalk with prominent yellow stripes
black SUV passes close by on the right as character approaches the median

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection along the yellow striped crosswalk toward the median

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past the crosswalk on the right side

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crosswalk marked with thick yellow parallel stripes and red text
orange metal barrier system separating traffic lanes on the median
high-rise futuristic office towers with illuminated windows against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open intersection crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes. Orange median barriers appear in the distance while tall glass buildings rise on the left. A black SUV passes closely on the right as the character continues toward the median.

scene_state.functional_zone: median strip with orange safety barriers between multi-lane roads

events.description: character pauses on the median to let traffic pass before continuing to cross
character steps off the crosswalk onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting on the median barrier for traffic to clear, then completing the street crossing

entered.detail: massive vertical advertisement screen displaying 'So fresh it wiggles in your mouth' text
sleek contemporary building with geometric concrete panels and teal accent lighting
futuristic public seating along the approaching sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character stops on the median with orange barriers to the left, waiting as vehicles pass. A large digital billboard advertising fresh food dominates the right side. After pausing, the character continues across the remaining lanes and steps onto the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial sidewalk with benches and neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing seated pedestrians and modern street furniture

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the futuristic street bench
pedestrian walking in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: commercial buildings with bright neon signage and illuminated windows
futuristic traffic signal posts with glowing red and green lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the opposite sidewalk, passing by street benches where pedestrians sit. Palm trees continue to line the path while neon storefronts glow in the background. The scene features moderate pedestrian activity with people walking and resting along the futuristic commercial corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character navigates a neon-lit commercial district, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk across a wide urban intersection to a bustling pedestrian corridor. It begins along a wet pavement beside the Eden Plaza building, where pink and cyan neon signs reflect off the ground near palm trees and orange safety railings. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a broad intersection marked by bold yellow crosswalk stripes and towering glass architecture, with a black SUV passing closely by. The camera then follows the character to a median lined with orange barriers, pausing briefly beneath a massive digital food billboard before continuing across the remaining lanes. Finally, the view shifts back to a sidewalk environment, passing street benches and resting pedestrians amidst a glow of neon storefronts and palm trees.
